claim_ladder.evidence_required: Frozen 100-example hard-gold diagnostic with C1 and threshold-robustness C6 gates.
claim_ladder.paper_sentence: If C1/C6 pass, report systematic evaluation blind spots for the base evaluation-criteria policy.
claim_ladder.downgrade_rule: Does not support any trained-method claim by itself.

claim_ladder.evidence_required: Hard-gold BSC coverage change with stable redundancy and hallucination under the fixed protocol.
claim_ladder.paper_sentence: If C0/C2/C3 pass, report a hard-gold BSC coverage change as metric evidence.
claim_ladder.downgrade_rule: Without downstream support, report metric-only BSC evidence.

claim_ladder.evidence_required: SFT-only vs SFT+GRPO and reward-component ablations pass C5/C7/C14.
claim_ladder.paper_sentence: If C5/C7/C14 pass, attribute the coverage change to the RLVR reward stage.
claim_ladder.downgrade_rule: Without C14, report proxy-gold supervision evidence rather than RLVR evidence.

claim_ladder.evidence_required: RewardBench, RewardBench-2, and JudgeBench API/model scorer rows pass C4/C9/C10.
claim_ladder.paper_sentence: If C0/C4/C9/C10/C12 pass, report held-out downstream judge-utility support.
claim_ladder.downgrade_rule: Without C12, write aggregate coverage change rather than dimension-level recovery; without C0, no trained-method row is paper-facing.

claim_discipline: Treat rebuttal entries as reviewer-facing readiness notes, not as new paper claims.
Use an answer only when the matched Evidence Matrix rows are safe_to_claim and submission readiness is ok.
